home.hero_subtitle: Connect your MT4/MT5 account, subscribe to verified signal providers, and let our engine replicate every trade automatically.
home.features_title: Everything you need to trade smarter
home.cta_subtitle: Connect your MT4/MT5 account in minutes. No technical setup required.
home.hero_badge: Beta · Paper trading is always free
home.how_subtitle: Three steps from sign-up to live copy trading
home.how1_desc: Securely link your account via MetaAPI. Credentials are AES-256 encrypted — we never see your password.
home.how2_desc: Browse verified signal providers ranked by Sharpe ratio, max drawdown, and win rate. Try paper trading first — free, no risk.
home.how3_desc: Every trade is replicated in < 5ms with your custom lot multiplier. Auto-pause kicks in if weekly drawdown hits your limit.
home.paper_desc: Follow any Master in simulation mode for 30 days. Real signals, real calculations, zero money at risk. When you're confident, upgrade to live copy trading with one click.
home.verified_badge: All records verified via MetaAPI — no demo accounts
home.features_subtitle: Built by traders, for traders — no feature bloat
home.feat1_desc: Replicate every MT4/MT5 trade in real-time with configurable lot multiplier and symbol filters.
home.feat2_desc: Follow a Master for 30 days in simulation — zero money at risk — before committing to a paid subscription.
home.feat3_desc: Pro-grade charts with MA/EMA/RSI/MACD/Bollinger, forex screener, macro panel (Fed rate, CPI), and correlation heatmap.
home.feat4_desc: Set your weekly drawdown limit. The platform auto-pauses copy trading and sends an email alert the moment it's breached.
home.feat5_desc: Ctrl+J opens an AI assistant that reads live market context and explains any Master's trading style in plain language.
home.feat6_desc: Built-in lot size calculator using balance, risk %, stop loss pips, and pip value — never risk more than you intend.
home.feat7_desc: See real-time long/short sentiment from all platform signals. Know when the crowd is piling in before you follow.
home.feat8_desc: Find which hour of the day each Master makes money. Session heatmaps and 24h P&L breakdown before you subscribe.
home.pricing_subtitle: Platform takes 20% of Master subscription fees — the rest goes directly to the Master
home.plan_master_i2: Set your own monthly subscription fee
home.terminal_title: A professional trading terminal — built in
home.terminal_desc: Live charts with technical indicators, forex screener, macroeconomic data (Fed rate, CPI, yield curve), correlation heatmap, and an AI assistant. All in one browser tab, no downloads required.
home.terminal_feat1: MA / EMA / Bollinger Bands / RSI / MACD on candlestick chart
home.terminal_feat2: Forex screener sorted by change % and volatility
home.terminal_feat3: FRED macroeconomic data — Fed rate, CPI, unemployment
home.terminal_feat5: AI chat assistant (Ctrl+J) with live market context
home.cta_disclaimer: No credit card required · Cancel anytime · Paper trading is always free

leaderboard.title: Signal Provider Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Ranked by verified performance. All accounts are independently audited via MetaAPI.

auth.register_role_master: I want to be a Signal Provider
auth.error_desc: Something went wrong during sign in. Please try again.

dashboard.no_copy_trades_hint: Subscribe to a master to start copying.
dashboard.onboarding_steps: {completed}/{total} steps done — followers can't subscribe until setup is complete
dashboard.connect_success: Stripe Connect account linked — you can now receive payouts.
dashboard.connect_expired: Stripe Connect session expired. Click "Set up" again to restart.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile, notifications, and payout details
settings.email_hint: Email is managed by your auth provider and cannot be changed here.
settings.username_hint: Visible on the leaderboard and to followers.
settings.display_name_hint: Optional full name shown on your profile.
settings.strategy_placeholder: Describe your trading style, markets, and risk approach…
settings.strategy_char_limit: {count}/200 — complete this to finish your profile setup
settings.wallet_hint: Earnings are sent here on the 1st of each month.
settings.wallet_warning: Double-check the address. Crypto payments are irreversible.
settings.notif_signals_desc: Email when a master opens or closes a trade

terminal.ai_greeting: Hi! I'm your AI terminal assistant. Ask me anything about {symbol} — price action, news context, master sentiment, or upcoming events.
terminal.ai_error: I couldn't reach the AI service right now. Please check your API configuration.
terminal.ai_disclaimer: Ctrl+J to toggle · Not financial advice
terminal.cmd_placeholder: Search symbols, go to news, calendar…
terminal.calc_pip_note: Pip value estimate. Actual varies with broker leverage and account currency.

accounts.title: My MT4/MT5 Accounts
accounts.subtitle: Manage your connected trading accounts
accounts.empty_desc: Connect your MT4 or MT5 account to start copying trades.
accounts.disconnect_confirm: Disconnect this account? Active copy trades will be paused.

subscriptions_page.title: My Subscriptions
subscriptions_page.success_msg: Subscription successful! Copy trading has started.
subscriptions_page.empty_desc: Follow a signal provider to start auto copy trading.
subscriptions_page.more_providers: Want to follow more signal providers?
subscriptions_page.cancel_confirm: Cancel subscription to {name}? This will stop all copy trading.
subscriptions_page.success_desc: You're now automatically copying trades from your selected signal provider. Trades will appear in your MT4/MT5 account within seconds.

signals_page.title: Copy Signals
signals_page.subtitle: Signals received from your subscribed masters
signals_page.empty_desc: Subscribe to a master trader to start receiving signals.

trades_page.title: Copy Trade History
trades_page.subtitle: All trades executed on your account via copy trading
trades_page.empty: No copy trades yet. Subscribe to a Master and trades will appear here automatically.

apply_master.title: Become a Master Trader
apply_master.subtitle: Share your strategy and earn 80% of subscription revenue
apply_master.perk_control_desc: Set your own price and trading rules
apply_master.description_ph: Describe your trading approach, instruments traded, risk management, and why followers should trust your signals...
apply_master.perf_targets_subtitle: Based on your actual track record. This will be displayed on your public profile.
apply_master.terms: By applying you confirm your trading history is genuine, you will not manipulate trades to deceive followers, and you agree to the Master Terms of Service. Accounts found to violate these terms will be permanently suspended.
apply_master.submitted_desc: Our team will review your application within 1–3 business days. You'll receive an email with the decision.
apply_master.status_approved_desc: Your account is verified. Go to Earnings to track your income.
apply_master.status_pending_email: You will be notified by email within 1–3 business days.
apply_master.status_rejected_desc: You can submit a new application below with updated information.

earnings.title: Earnings
earnings.subtitle: Your income as a signal provider — platform takes 20%, you keep 80%
earnings.price_note: Price changes apply to new subscribers only. Existing subscribers keep their current rate until next billing cycle.
earnings.no_payouts: No payouts yet — earnings appear once followers subscribe
earnings.payout_info: Payouts are processed on the 1st of each month via USDT (TRC20) to your registered wallet address. Performance fees use the high-water mark method.

master_profile.no_perf_data: No performance data yet. Will appear once leaderboard calculation completes.
master_profile.grade_desc_high: Excellent risk management — low drawdown, stable returns. Suitable for most followers.
master_profile.grade_desc_mid: Good performance, moderate risk. Recommend setting reasonable lot multiplier.
master_profile.grade_desc_low: Higher volatility. Recommend lower lot multiplier and tighter drawdown limit.
master_profile.tip_desc: Click the Backtest tab, enter your capital and lot multiplier to see this Master's historical equity curve.
master_profile.paper_notice: Paper mode: signals are recorded and calculated but not executed in a real MT4 account. Good for evaluating strategy performance.

analytics_tabs.ai_hint: Click "Generate Analysis" — AI will analyze this Master's trading style, risk preference, and favorite instruments based on real trade history.
analytics_tabs.run_hint: Simulates ${capital} following this Master for {days} days, replaying historical trade performance.
analytics_tabs.no_trades_in_period: No trade history in this period.
analytics_tabs.no_edge_data: Insufficient trade data to calculate edge metrics.
analytics_tabs.expectancy_formula: = Win Rate × Avg Win − Loss Rate × Avg Loss

unsubscribe.done_desc: You'll no longer receive marketing emails from ArbMind. Transactional emails (subscription receipts, security alerts) will still be sent.
unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe from emails
unsubscribe.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
unsubscribe.prompt: Click below to unsubscribe {email} from ArbMind marketing emails.

offline.title: You're offline
offline.desc: ArbMind needs a connection for live market data. Check your network and try again.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.login_to_review: Sign in to leave a review
reviews.self_note: You can't review your own profile

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.new_body_ph: Write an update for your followers…

footer.disclaimer: Trading derivatives carries a substantial risk of loss. Some figures shown may be illustrative sample data. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

analyst.title: AI Analyst
analyst.subtitle: Multi-agent research — analysts debate, then decide. Powered by AI.
analyst.unavailable_desc: An administrator needs to add the AI provider and market-data API keys.
analyst.hint: A full multi-agent run takes 1–3 minutes and runs in the background.
analyst.rate_limited: Too many analyses — please slow down.
